ballpark_pal.description: A horizontal-shaped outfield with taller-than-average fences. Shallow to center field and deep to the corners . A 16-foot wall covers most of the right-field gap, compensating for how close it is at parts.

weather.description: A horizontal-shaped outfield with taller-than-average fences. Shallow to center field and deep to the corners . A 16-foot wall covers most of the right-field gap, compensating for how close it is at parts.

ballpark_pal.description: An unevenly shaped outfield with a deep left side . The tall fence in right makes up for a shallow right field corner . Benefits from warm temperatures and relatively high altitude .

weather.description: An unevenly shaped outfield with a deep left side . The tall fence in right makes up for a shallow right field corner . Benefits from warm temperatures and relatively high altitude .

ballpark_pal.description: A large, symmetrical outfield with deep corners and gaps . The center field fence is a few feet closer than the MLB standard.

weather.description: A large, symmetrical outfield with deep corners and gaps . The center field fence is a few feet closer than the MLB standard.

ballpark_pal.description: A medium-sized outfield with consistent weather conditions . Plays shallow to center and deeper to both sides . The San Diego marine layer can reduce carry distance , especially at night.

weather.description: A medium-sized outfield with consistent weather conditions . Plays shallow to center and deeper to both sides . The San Diego marine layer can reduce carry distance , especially at night.

ballpark_pal.description: A uniquely shaped field with a 24 foot-tall fence guarding a very shallow right-field corner . Straight-away center is close to home plate but extends to an extremely deep right-field gap . Cool temperatures are the norm and the ever-present out-blowing wind is neutralized by the stadium architecture.

weather.description: A uniquely shaped field with a 24 foot-tall fence guarding a very shallow right-field corner . Straight-away center is close to home plate but extends to an extremely deep right-field gap . Cool temperatures are the norm and the ever-present out-blowing wind is neutralized by the stadium architecture.

ballpark_pal.description: A symmetrical outfield with a highly consistent wind pattern (out to right-center). Plays deep down the lines and particularly shallow to center field.

weather.description: A symmetrical outfield with a highly consistent wind pattern (out to right-center). Plays deep down the lines and particularly shallow to center field.
